creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Maxim Ianoglo <dotnox@gmail.com> -----

From: Maxim Ianoglo <dotnox@gmail.com>
To: freebsd-bugs@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: misc/142891: netstat issue ?

Hello,

i am sorry.
i was able to manage this by myself.
I just found that netstat was modified after release ( on 25 November )
and seems that the CVS server from which I've updated my i386 machine was a little bit outdated.

Please close this case.

Thank you.
--
Maxim Ianoglo ( dotNox@gmail.com )
